title: Lexi (disambiguation)
content:
'''Lexi''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*'''[[Lexi]]''', a [[scrumrat]] from [[Corellia]]
*'''[[Lexi Dio]]''', a [[senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic]]
*'''[[Lexi Greylark]]''', a [[Republic Defense Coalition]] [[pilot]] 
*'''[[L-X1]]''', an announcer [[droid]] also called '''Lexi'''

==Legends==
*[[Lexi Dio/Legends|'''Lexi Dio''']], a senator during the early days of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*[[Lexi Dio (starship)|'''''Lexi Dio''''']], an assault bomber used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]
*'''[[Lexi Fernandin]]''', a [[Scout/Legends|scout]]

{{Disambig}}
{{Interlang
|ja=レクシー
}}
